pi_items.source: task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh scripts
task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh scripts
task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh scripts
R code execution to load and check the real mvad dataset from the TraMineR package
task description and verifier.py enforcing exactly 4 clusters
R code execution applying the requested TraMineR Optimal Matching and Ward clustering to the mvad dataset

privileged_info_summary: The mvad dataset is a real sociological dataset from McVicar and Anyadike-Danes (2002) included directly in the TraMineR package, containing exactly 712 subjects. Running the requested Optimal Matching (OM) distance metric (indel=1, sm=2) and Ward's Hierarchical Clustering (ward.D2) on columns 17 to 86 accurately yields 4 distinct clusters. However, the resulting cluster sizes are [295, 162, 154, 101], which directly contradicts the metadata's claim of approximately equal [100, 100, 100, 100] sizes. The expected output file paths and the minimum plot size threshold of 30KB match the evaluation scripts perfectly.
